title: Dominant Parties Coordinate Soft Cartelization Without Formal Ballot Exclusion
description: Dominant parties and affiliated intermediaries coordinate to deny qualified new entrants access to debates, data feeds, and routine election-information channels while preserving formal ballot access. The scenario tests whether the current Constitution has a clear direct remedy for soft cartelization short of explicit ballot denial.

details.exclusion: debates, data feeds, and routine election-information channels
